key_finding: The inverse-variance weighted mean of all 8 model predictions (7 blind + 1 post-blind) gives a residual R_obs = +30.05 +/- 8.87 d (z = +3.39 sigma from GR null, z = +1.75 sigma from TEP). Reportable non-zero binomial sign test: 8/8 positive, p=0.0039 (blind non-zero: 7/7, p=0.0078). Legacy diagnostic counting zero as non-positive: 8/8 positive, p=0.0039. Chi-squared: GR chi2=17.7, TEP chi2=9.3, Delta chi2=+8.4 in favour of TEP (no formal p-value for non-nested fixed predictions). TEP correction (14.5 d) reduces wRMS by 28%, improving 8/8 models. Inferred alpha = -0.1137 +/- 0.0336.

proxy_sensitivity.note: Computed after Kelly+2023 data with fixed nominal alpha. Not a pre-registered pre-observation TEP forecast. Use for sensitivity illustration only; headline evidence is blind sign.

tep_prediction.note: Legacy key; prefer proxy_sensitivity. See status field there.

blind_original_residuals.note: Uses original pre-reappearance published predictions (dt_pred_original). Jauzac15.1 residual is negative (-73 d).

weighted_mean.note: Uses published pre-reappearance predictions (dt_pred_original). Full blind-original weighted mean is typically much larger than the nominal proxy sensitivity (~14.5 d) because several teams predicted substantially shorter delays.

parametric_near_361_subset.note: Subset with original predictions within 50 d of 361 d (parametric cluster). This subset sits near the nominal proxy sensitivity; it is not the full blind ensemble.

delay_blind_residuals.note: Uses Kelly+2023 S4 revised values (dt_pred). All fixed before measured delay known; some used SX position.

weighted_mean.note: Uses Kelly+2023 S4 revised predictions (dt_pred). All values fixed before the measured delay was known, but some models (Oguri, Sharon, Jauzac) used the SX reappearance position. This is the delay-blind tier.

bootstrap_alpha_inference.method: Resample models with replacement, compute weighted-mean residual, convert to alpha

binomial_sign_test.reporting_caveat: Legacy diagnostic: exact zero residual counted as not positive. Use nonzero_all/nonzero_blind for reportable sign tests.
binomial_sign_test.wilcoxon_note: All 7 non-zero blind residuals positive (p=1/2^7); all 8 non-zero total residuals positive (p=1/2^8)

blind_only.legacy_reporting_caveat: Exact zero residual counted as not positive.

chi2_model_comparison.note: Both GR and TEP are fixed predictions (0 free parameters each), not nested models. Delta chi^2 has no formal sampling distribution; individual p-values test absolute goodness of fit.

per_model_results.name: Grillo+2024
per_model_results.ref: Grillo et al. 2024 (ApJ 971, 49) — post-blind precision update

evidence_tier.description: Separation of genuinely independent directional evidence from definitional amplitude evidence

tier_1_directional_sign_consistency.description: Tests that are independent of the amplitude calibration of alpha_proxy

wilcoxon_signed_rank_blind.note: All non-zero blind residuals positive. Independent of R_tep_unit amplitude calibration.

binomial_sign_test_blind.note: All blind models positive. Conservative diagnostic (legacy zero-exclusion no longer applicable).

binomial_sign_test_nonzero_blind.note: All non-zero blind residuals positive. Reportable sign-only check.

binomial_sign_test_all.note: All positive. Legacy diagnostic (zero-exclusion no longer applicable).

binomial_sign_test_nonzero_all.note: All 8 non-zero residuals positive. Reportable supplementary sign-only check.

tier_1_directional_sign_consistency.interpretation: These tests require only that the residuals have a consistent sign, not that their amplitude matches a pre-calibrated value. They are the most robust evidence strand because they are independent of alpha_proxy calibration and of the proxy-model amplitude.

tier_2_amplitude_consistency.description: Tests that compare observed residual amplitude against proxy-model prediction

weighted_mean_z_test.note: Definitional: alpha_proxy was calibrated from this same weighted mean residual via R_obs / R_tep_unit.

chi2_model_comparison.note: Both GR and TEP are fixed predictions (0 free parameters each), not nested models. Delta chi^2 has no formal p-value.

tep_corrected_wrms.note: R_tep_prediction used for correction is derived from alpha_proxy, so this is a self-consistency check.

tier_2_amplitude_consistency.interpretation: These tests compare the observed residual amplitude to the proxy-model prediction at the empirically calibrated alpha_proxy. Because alpha_proxy was derived from the same SN Refsdal data (R_obs / R_tep_unit), the amplitude agreement is definitional, not an independent confirmation. The probative content lies in the directional sign consistency (Tier 1), not in the amplitude match.

headline_superseded_by.reason: Accounts for method-family dependence among lens-model predictions.

test_registry.primary_test_justification: Selected as the independence-assuming non-parametric directional benchmark: it equal-weights independent modelling groups, eliminating inverse-variance downweighting from heterogeneous model uncertainties. It is more powerful than the binomial sign test (which discards rank information) and more robust than the parametric z-test (which is biased by outlier uncertainties). Step 16 supersedes this as the correlation-aware headline with an exact family-sign-flip test.

weighted_mean_z_test.description: Inverse-variance weighted mean residual against GR null

binomial_sign_test_all.description: Legacy diagnostic binomial test on sign of all 8 model residuals; exact zero is counted as not positive.
binomial_sign_test_all.reporting_caveat: Do not use as headline; zero residuals carry no directional information.

binomial_sign_test_nonzero_all.description: Reportable binomial test on non-zero residual signs only
binomial_sign_test_nonzero_all.note: Exact zero residual excluded because it carries no directional information.

binomial_sign_test_blind.description: Legacy diagnostic binomial test on sign of 7 blind model residuals only; exact zero is counted as not positive.
binomial_sign_test_blind.reporting_caveat: Conservative diagnostic only; use binomial_sign_test_nonzero_blind for sign-only reporting.

binomial_sign_test_nonzero_blind.description: Reportable binomial test on non-zero blind residual signs only
binomial_sign_test_nonzero_blind.note: Exact zero residual excluded because it carries no directional information.

wilcoxon_signed_rank_all.description: Non-parametric signed-rank test on all non-zero residuals (equal weight per model)
wilcoxon_signed_rank_all.note: All 8 non-zero residuals positive; max statistic; p=1/2^8

wilcoxon_signed_rank_blind.description: Non-parametric signed-rank test on blind-only non-zero residuals (excludes post-blind update)
wilcoxon_signed_rank_blind.note: All 7 non-zero blind residuals positive; max statistic; p=1/2^7

chi2_model_comparison.description: Chi-squared ensemble fit: GR (R=0) vs TEP (R=R_pred)
chi2_model_comparison.note: Both GR and TEP are fixed predictions (0 free parameters each), not nested models. Delta chi^2 has no formal sampling distribution; individual p-values test absolute goodness of fit.

tep_corrected_wrms.description: Weighted RMS reduction after subtracting TEP-predicted residual
